span.p:
Biology target
pathway, molecule,
species or evidence gap

div.style: color: rgb(5, 46, 22) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Public genomes + transcriptomes
NCBI, SRA, UniProt, KEGG, MIBiG

div.style: color: rgb(66, 32, 6) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Seed queries + controls
known enzymes, domains,
positive controls, decoys

div.style: color: rgb(8, 51, 68) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Candidate search
BLAST, DIAMOND, MMseqs2,
HMMER, Foldseek

div.style: color: rgb(23, 37, 84) !important; display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Genome context
coordinates, neighborhoods,
cluster windows

div.style: color: rgb(46, 16, 101) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Comparative genomics
orthology, paralogs,
synteny across species

div.style: color: rgb(67, 20, 7) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Function prediction
BGC callers, EC/KO,
protein structure signals

div.style: color: rgb(80, 7, 36) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
Pathway map

cluster hypotheses
natural-product route

div.style: color: rgb(66, 32, 6) !important; display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;

span.p:
